title: Bridge Essay: Active interoceptive inference and the emotional brain.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent-arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Dependent arising — predictive processing, free energy principle, active inference, Bayesian brain, prediction error in perception and action.

**Active interoceptive inference and the emotional brain.** — Philos Trans R Soc Lond B Biol Sci. PMID: 28080966. DOI: 10.1098/rstb.2016.0007. We review arecent shift in conceptions of interoception and its relationship to hierarchical inference in the brain. The notion of interoceptive inference means that bodily states are regulated by autonomic reflexes that are enslaved by descending predictions from deep generative models of our internal and external milieu. This re-conceptualization illuminates several issues in cognitive and clinical neuroscience with implications for experiences of selfhood and emotion. We first contextualize...
